description: Determinism — same semantic intent expressed as synonym swaps, order inversions, punctuation noise, and token repetition must produce identical primary domain. Validates routing stability under surface variation.

cases.note: Canonical form — order variant set E1
Order inversion — retire keyword at tail
Canonical form — order variant set E2

cases.input: financing for a car to buy
cases.note: Order inversion — car keyword at tail
Canonical form — order variant set E3
Full inversion — CAREER keywords at tail
Punctuation noise — commas and question marks injected
Determinism check — same input run 10x must return identical primary domain each time
